sanskrit:
स एवायं मया तेऽद्य योगः प्रोक्तः पुरातनः।
भक्तोऽसि मे सखा चेति रहस्यं ह्येतदुत्तमम्॥
transliteration:
sa evāyaṃ mayā te’dya yogaḥ proktaḥ purātanaḥ |
bhakto’si me sakhā ceti rahasyaṃ hyetad uttamam ||
literal_meaning: That very ancient yoga is today declared by Me to you because you are My devotee and friend; this is the supreme secret.
contextual_meaning: Krishna signals that deep transformative knowledge is not given indiscriminately; it requires relational safety (friendship) and openness (devotion).  Arjuna’s crisis has earned him access to a timeless inner technology because his heart is both loyal and intimate with the therapist-guide.
psychological_state: Arjuna experiences a moment of ‘earned secure base’—the calming recognition that his vulnerability and loyalty have made him eligible for a life-changing intervention.
trigger_scenario: A client is told by their therapist, ‘I’m sharing this evidence-based trauma protocol with you because you’ve shown up consistently and done the homework; not every client is ready for this step.’
anchor_text: Trust and love unlock the deepest teachings.
